assertions.title: Active setup and smoke scripts invoke renamed entrypoints and labels

steps.action: Run the deterministic active-script scan across `package.json` and the in-scope operator setup/smoke scripts under `scripts/`.
steps.expected: The live setup/smoke script surface advertises only renamed entrypoints and labels, with no forbidden `paperclipai`, `Paperclip`, `X-Paperclip`, `paperclip-create-agent`, or `paperclip-create-plugin` hits.
steps.observed: Scanned 9 files; positive_matches=106; forbidden_hits=0. The previously failing clean-onboard script surfaces now show renamed `papierklammer` references in the scan transcript.

assertions.title: Main CLI-to-server mutation flow uses the renamed run-trace contract end-to-end

steps.action: Create one validation issue through the shipped CLI with `pnpm --dir /Users/aischool/work/papierklammer_droid papierklammer issue create --api-base http://127.0.0.1:3100 -C d3a8f62c-cec4-43d9-b3a5-11fe61383962 --title <timestamped-title> --json`.
steps.expected: The representative mutation succeeds in the dedicated company and surfaces a non-null renamed run trace on the created issue record.
steps.observed: Exit 0; created RUNAAA-2 (3a772ed0-f1cd-4ef8-b1d9-4e6d0c84ae43); CLI JSON included originRunId=8f51e699-899a-482c-97f1-ccbc9ab7f577.

steps.expected: The follow-up `issue.created` activity records the same non-null run id instead of `null`, proving the shipped CLI mutation carries the renamed run-trace contract end-to-end.

evidence.network: CLI POST /api/companies/d3a8f62c-cec4-43d9-b3a5-11fe61383962/issues via `papierklammer issue create`; GET /api/issues/3a772ed0-f1cd-4ef8-b1d9-4e6d0c84ae43/activity -> 200
evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Created issue RUNAAA-2 recorded non-null run id 8f51e699-899a-482c-97f1-ccbc9ab7f577 in the follow-up issue.created activity.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: VAL-CLI-004=pass; VAL-CROSS-005=pass. The deterministic script scan was clean, and the representative CLI issue mutation for RUNAAA-2 recorded runId=8f51e699-899a-482c-97f1-ccbc9ab7f577 in follow-up activity.
